title: gypsophila fastigiata subsp. belorossica
intro: Gypsophila fastigiata subsp. belorossica, also known as Belorussian baby's breath, is a plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae. It is used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing. The herbal preparations of Gypsophila fastigiata subsp. belorossica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
